Off Calendar Jul-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
the following cases are heard concurrently:
CGC-18-568657 Howard Jarvis Taxpayers Assn, et al VS. City and County of San Francisco, et al
CGC-19-573230 City and County of San Francisco, et al VS. All Persons Interested in the Matter of Proposition C on the Nov. 6, 2018 San Francisco Ballot

Appearances:
Wayne K. Snodgrass, esq. and Scott Reiber, esq. (415-554-4675) Deputy City Attorney for Plaintiff.
Chris Skinnell, esq. (415-389-6800) of Nielson Merksamer...LLP for Defendants.

Hearing is held . The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA BUSINESS PROPERTIES ASSOCIATION, HOWARD JARVIS TAXPAYERS ASSOCIATION, and CALIFORNIA BUSINESS ROUNDTABLE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
